stage_title: 同步互斥与进程间通信

answers.stem: 该内核提供了哪些同步原语？（SpinLock/Mutex/RwLock/Semaphore/Condvar/WaitQueue 等；列出类型定义证据）
answers.value: SpinLock: include/sync/spinlock.h struct spinlock { uint locked; char *name; struct cpu *cpu; }; SleepLock: include/sync/sleeplock.h struct sleeplock { uint locked; struct spinlock lk; char *name; int pid; }; WaitQueue: include/sync/waitqueue.h struct wait_queue { struct spinlock lock; struct d_list head; }; 未发现 RwLock/Semaphore/Condvar 实现

evidence.excerpt: struct spinlock { uint locked; char *name; struct cpu *cpu; };
struct sleeplock { uint locked; struct spinlock lk; char *name; int pid; };
struct wait_queue { struct spinlock lock; struct d_list head; };

answers.stem: Mutex 更接近哪种实现？
answers.value: B. 阻塞锁（Blocking Mutex，进入等待队列并挂起）

evidence.excerpt: void acquiresleep(struct sleeplock *lk) { acquire(&lk->lk); while (lk->locked) { sleep(lk, &lk->lk); } lk->locked = 1; ... }

answers.stem: 是否存在等待队列 (Wait Queue, WaitQueue) 与 sleep/wakeup（或等价阻塞/唤醒）实现？（必须三态）

evidence.excerpt: struct wait_queue { struct spinlock lock; struct d_list head; }; struct wait_node { void *chan; struct d_list list; };
void sleep(void *chan, struct spinlock *lk) { ... __remove(p); __insert_sleep(p); sched(); ... }
void wakeup(void *chan) { __enter_proc_cs __wakeup_no_lock(chan); __leave_proc_cs }

answers.stem:
sleep / wakeup 不变量 (Sleep-Wakeup Invariant) 分析，按格式填写：
- sleep 入口函数: ___（路径）
- 入睡前持有的锁: ___（无则写 none）
- 防丢 wakeup (Lost Wakeup Prevention) 机制: ___（如：持队列锁检查条件 / 无防护）
- wakeup 函数: ___（路径）
- 唤醒与锁释放顺序: ___（先唤醒后释放 / 先释放后唤醒 / 其他）
answers.value:
sleep 入口函数：kernel/sched/proc.c::sleep()
入睡前持有的锁：传入的 lk（调用者持有）+ proc_lock（内部获取）
防丢 wakeup (Lost Wakeup Prevention) 机制：持队列锁检查条件 / 在 proc_lock 保护下插入睡眠队列
wakeup 函数：kernel/sched/proc.c::wakeup()
唤醒与锁释放顺序：先唤醒后释放（在 proc_lock 保护下遍历睡眠队列并唤醒）

evidence.excerpt: void sleep(void *chan, struct spinlock *lk) { if (&proc_lock != lk) { __enter_proc_cs release(lk); } p->chan = chan; __remove(p); __insert_sleep(p); sched(); p->chan = NULL; __leave_proc_cs acquire(lk); }

void wakeup(void *chan) { __enter_proc_cs __wakeup_no_lock(chan); __leave_proc_cs } static void __wakeup_no_lock(void *chan) { struct proc *p = proc_sleep; while (NULL != p) { struct proc *next = p->sched_next; if ((uint64)chan == (uint64)p->chan) { __remove(p); p->timer = TIMER_IRQ; p->chan = NULL; __insert_runnable(PRIORITY_IRQ, p); } p = next; } }

answers.stem: 是否实现管道 (Pipe)？（必须三态）

evidence.excerpt: struct pipe { struct spinlock lock; struct wait_queue wqueue; struct wait_queue rqueue; uint nread; uint nwrite; int readopen; int writeopen; char data[PIPESIZE]; };
int pipealloc(struct file **pf0, struct file **pf1) { ... pi = kmalloc(sizeof(struct pipe)); ... }

answers.stem: pipe 缓冲形态更接近哪种？
answers.value: A. 字节环形缓冲区 (ring buffer)

evidence.excerpt: struct pipe { ... char data[PIPESIZE]; uint nread; uint nwrite; ... };
char *paddr = pi->data + pi->nwrite % PIPESIZE; ... pi->nwrite += count;

answers.stem: pipe 的阻塞语义更接近哪种？
answers.value: A. 阻塞：挂起当前线程/任务进入等待队列

evidence.excerpt: while ((m = pi->nwrite - pi->nread) == PIPESIZE) { if (pi->readopen == 0 || pr->killed) { m = -1; break; } pipewakeup(pi, PIPE_READER); sleep(wait->chan, &pi->lock); }
while ((m = pi->nwrite - pi->nread) == 0 && pi->writeopen) { if (pr->killed) { m = -1; break; } sleep(wait->chan, &pi->lock); }

syscalls 数组中未包含 msg/sem/shm 相关系统调用处理函数

answers.stem: 是否实现信号机制（sigaction/kill/sigreturn/trampoline）？（必须三态）

evidence.excerpt: struct sigaction { union { __sighandler_t sa_handler; } __sigaction_handler; __sigset_t sa_mask; int sa_flags; }; int set_sigaction(...); void sighandle(void); void sigreturn(void);
#define SYS_kill 129 #define SYS_rt_sigaction 134 #define SYS_rt_sigprocmask 135 #define SYS_rt_sigreturn 139
.globl sig_trampoline sig_trampoline: .globl sig_handler sig_handler: jalr a1 li a7, SYS_rt_sigreturn ecall

answers.stem: 若实现 signal handler：用户态 handler 上下文如何构建？是否存在 sigreturn 恢复原 trap frame？（必须给证据）
answers.value: 用户态 handler 上下文构建：在 kernel/sched/signal.c::sighandle() 中，分配 sig_frame 结构保存当前 trapframe，设置新的 trapframe 指向 sig_trampoline 中的 sig_handler。sigreturn 恢复：存在，在 kernel/sched/signal.c::sigreturn() 中从 sig_frame 链表中恢复之前的 trapframe 和信号掩码

evidence.excerpt: frame = kmalloc(sizeof(struct sig_frame)); tf = kmalloc(sizeof(struct trapframe)); for (int i = 0; i < SIGSET_LEN; i ++) { frame->mask.__val[i] = p->sig_set.__val[i]; ... } frame->tf = p->trapframe; tf->epc = (uint64)(SIG_TRAMPOLINE + ((uint64)sig_handler - (uint64)sig_trampoline)); tf->sp = p->trapframe->sp; tf->a0 = signum; ... p->trapframe = tf; frame->next = p->sig_frame; p->sig_frame = frame;

void sigreturn(void) { struct proc *p = myproc(); if (NULL == p->sig_frame) { exit(-1); } struct sig_frame *frame = p->sig_frame; for (int i = 0; i < SIGSET_LEN; i ++) { p->sig_set.__val[i] = frame->mask.__val[i]; } kfree(p->trapframe); p->trapframe = frame->tf; p->sig_frame = frame->next; kfree(frame); }

answers.stem: RwLock（读写锁 Reader-Writer Lock）的实现形态更接近哪种？

evidence.excerpt: 在 include/sync 目录下搜索 rwlock/reader_writer 等关键字，未找到读写锁相关头文件或实现
在 kernel/sync 目录下仅找到 spinlock.c 和 sleeplock.c，无读写锁实现

answers.stem: 底层原子操作来源更接近哪种？

evidence.excerpt: while(__sync_lock_test_and_set(&lk->locked, 1) != 0) ; ... __sync_synchronize(); ... __sync_lock_release(&lk->locked);

On RISC-V, sync_lock_test_and_set turns into an atomic swap ... This code doesn't use a C assignment, since the C standard implies that an assignment might be implemented with multiple store instructions.

answers.stem:
死锁四必要条件（Coffman Conditions）在该内核中是否均成立？
请逐条作答（互斥 Mutual Exclusion / 持有并等待 Hold-and-Wait / 不可剥夺 No Preemption / 循环等待 Circular Wait），并结合 SpinLock/Mutex 的实现给出证据或写「不适用」。
answers.value: 互斥 Mutual Exclusion：成立。spinlock 使用__sync_lock_test_and_set 保证同一时刻只有一个 CPU 持有锁。持有并等待 Hold-and-Wait：成立。sleep() 函数中进程持有 lk 锁时调用 sched() 放弃 CPU，可能等待其他资源。不可剥夺 No Preemption：成立。锁只能由持有者主动 release() 释放，内核不会强制剥夺。循环等待 Circular Wait：可能成立。代码中未发现全局锁顺序规范，存在嵌套锁导致循环等待的可能性（如 pipe 操作中同时持有 pi->lock 和 queue->lock）。

evidence.excerpt: while(__sync_lock_test_and_set(&lk->locked, 1) != 0) ; ... lk->cpu = mycpu();
void sleep(void *chan, struct spinlock *lk) { ... acquire(&proc_lock); ... release(lk); ... __insert_sleep(p); sched(); ... acquire(lk); }

static void pipelock(struct pipe *pi, struct wait_node *wait, int who) { ... acquire(&q->lock); wait_queue_add(q, wait); while (!wait_queue_is_first(q, wait)) { sleep(wait->chan, &q->lock); } release(&q->lock); }

answers.stem: 内核对死锁 (Deadlock) 的处理策略更接近哪种？
answers.value: D. 忽略 (Ostrich Algorithm)：不处理，依赖外部重启

evidence.excerpt: 在附件中检索 deadlock prevention/avoidance/detection 相关代码，未找到死锁检测、避免或恢复机制。内核依赖程序员正确获取锁顺序
未找到全局锁顺序规范或死锁检测代码

answers.stem: 是否存在全局锁顺序（Lock Ordering）规范或注释，以预防嵌套锁导致的循环等待死锁 (Circular Wait Deadlock)？（必须三态；若 implemented 需给出锁排序规则或 ABBA 锁检测代码证据）

evidence.excerpt: 在附件中检索 lock ordering/lock hierarchy/ABBA deadlock 等关键字，未找到全局锁顺序规范或注释
proc_lock 与其他锁（如 p->lk）的获取顺序未在代码中明确规范，存在潜在死锁风险

answers.stem: 是否实现管程/条件变量 (Monitor / Condition Variable, Stallings Ch5)？（必须三态；搜索 Condvar / condition_variable / monitor / wait/notify/signal 等；若 implemented 需区分 Hoare 语义（等待者立即恢复）vs Mesa 语义（等待者重新竞争锁））

evidence.excerpt: void sleep(void *chan, struct spinlock *lk) { ... __insert_sleep(p); sched(); ... } // 进程释放锁后进入睡眠，唤醒后需重新获取锁
void wakeup(void *chan) { ... __wakeup_no_lock(chan); ... } // 唤醒的进程被插入 runnable 队列，需重新竞争锁，符合 Mesa 语义
while (!wait_queue_is_first(q, wait)) { sleep(wait->chan, &q->lock); } // 唤醒后需重新检查条件，Mesa 语义

answers.stem:
经典同步问题验证 (Classic Synchronization Problems, Stallings Ch5)：
以下三个经典问题在该内核中是否有对应实现或测试？
- 生产者-消费者 (Producer-Consumer / Bounded Buffer)：___（implemented/not_found + 证据）
- 读者-写者 (Readers-Writers)：___（实现了读者优先/写者优先/公平？ + 证据）
- 哲学家就餐 (Dining Philosophers)：___（implemented/not_found）
answers.value:
生产者 - 消费者 (Producer-Consumer / Bounded Buffer)：implemented - kernel/fs/pipe.c 中的 pipe 实现使用环形缓冲区和 wait_queue 实现生产者 - 消费者模式
读者 - 写者 (Readers-Writers)：not_found - 未找到读写锁或读者 - 写者问题测试代码
哲学家就餐 (Dining Philosophers)：not_found - 未找到哲学家就餐问题测试代码

evidence.excerpt: int pipewrite(struct pipe *pi, uint64 addr, int n) { ... while ((m = pipewritable(pi)) == PIPESIZE) { ... sleep(wait->chan, &pi->lock); } ... pipewakeup(pi, PIPE_READER); ... }
int piperead(struct pipe *pi, uint64 addr, int n) { ... while ((m = pipereadable(pi)) == 0 && pi->writeopen) { ... sleep(wait->chan, &pi->lock); } ... pipewakeup(pi, PIPE_WRITER); ... }
在 xv6-user 目录下搜索 readers_writers/dining_philosophers 等测试程序，未找到相关实现
